channel.title: security_longer on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in security_longer on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Zero Trust Security
item.description: In the past, security was built around the concept of a perimeter. The idea was to create a secure boundary around your network and then keep everything inside that boundary safe. However, this model is no longer effective in today’s world. The internet has made it possible for anyone to connect to your network, regardless of their location. This means that your perimeter is no longer secure. In addition, the increasing use of cloud computing and mobile devices has made it even more difficult to keep track of who is accessing your network and what they are doing.
